chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1637 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.3 and 4. He has also filed a schedule undertaking that entire commutation of petitioner i.e. Rs.24,43,200/- would be paid in two equal installments on 10th April, 2024 and 15th June, 2024 respectively. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and accordingly, this petition in above terms is disposed of. However, the default in payment would expose the defaulter(s) to contempt proceedings. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
